top_signals.title: Italy Negotiating With EU on Budget Flexibility, Giorgetti Says
top_signals.summary: Italy is negotiating with the European Union to find ways of obtaining leniency on energy-related budget spending, Finance Minister Giancarlo Giorgetti said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Musk and Altman take their battle from court to Wall Street ahead of landmark IPOs
top_signals.summary: Now that the Musk-Altman trial has reached a verdict, the two billionaires can turn their attention to readying their companies for the public market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
